-fx-cell-height.description: The height of each cell in the grid.

-fx-cell-width.description: The width of each cell in the grid.

-fx-horizontal-cell-spacing.description: The horizontal spacing between cells in the same row.

-fx-selection-area-boundary.description: The boundary that limits the area in which the user can create a selection.

-fx-selection-area-fill.description: The fill paint of the selected area.

-fx-selection-border-paint.description: The paint of the selection border.

-fx-selection-border-width.description: The width of the selection border.

-fx-unselected-area-boundary.description: The boundary that limits the area covered by the unselected area overlay.

-fx-unselected-area-fill.description: The fill paint of the area outside the selection.

-fx-vertical-cell-spacing.description: The vertical spacing between cells in the same column.

-thumb-move-animation-time.description: The duration in milliseconds for the thumb slide animation.
